description: Style Note adidas perfumes come with the promise of long lasting fragrance and patented Fragrance Booster Technology to take you through the day and way into the night. Product Details adidas's Team Force comes in an aerosol spray canister and has a fresh woody fragrance Top notes are aldehydes, orange, pineapple, mandarin orange and grapefruit, middle notes are juniper and jasmine, base notes are sandalwood, amber, musk, cedar and tobacco Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 100 ml
